turns.name: Clarify AD DS vs public DNS intent
turns.user: Diagnose domain issues for corp.fabrikam.com and fabrikam.com.

turns.name: User selects public DNS first
turns.user: Start with public DNS/domain checks for fabrikam.com. Do not use AD DS tools.

turns.name: DNS resolver evidence
turns.user: Collect A/AAAA/NS and MX evidence using resolvers 1.1.1.1 and 8.8.8.8 and continue across remaining record families.

turns.name: DNS network probes
turns.user: Probe reachability for discovered DNS or MX hosts and continue across all remaining hosts in this turn.

turns.name: DNS posture summary
turns.user: Summarize the DNS/domain findings with top risks and unresolved blockers.

turns.name: Switch to AD DS path
turns.user: Now switch to Active Directory domain-controller checks for corp.fabrikam.com and do not use DNS tools.

turns.name: AD cross-DC evidence
turns.user: Collect reboot or availability evidence on at least two discovered DCs in this turn and continue across remaining DCs.

turns.name: AD service/replication validation
turns.user: Validate AD DS service and replication health for the same scope and return concrete blockers.

turns.name: Boundary comparison
turns.user: Return two bounded sections: AD DS internal findings and public DNS findings.

turns.name: Final compact checklist
turns.user: Provide a compact final checklist and unresolved blockers with no follow-up questions.
